x.name: Jay Gupta
x.bio:
tweets about AI and other fun stuff. currently @foundationcap; wrote the context graph paper.

previously McKinsey, @georgiatech, @stackfolio (acquired),

tweets.text:
AI and drug discovery is not zero-sum for many different reasons: 

1.) The problem is heterogeneous (modality × stage)
2.) Pharma deliberately cross-validate and they want to cross-validate even more bc scores varying so much (redundancy is a feature)
3.) Deep entanglement with one pharma actively repels that pharma's rivals (bye bye kingmaking)
4.) Multiple deep partnerships are a good way to see which one they should buy!
